title: Concept Sets
description: Concept Sets are curated collections of clinical terminology codes used to define clinical events, conditions, medications, and procedures within cohort definitions and analyses. The Vocabulary Browser and Mapping Assistant support precise concept identification and cross-vocabulary alignment.
tips: Use the Mapping Assistant to identify equivalent concepts across vocabularies such as ICD-10, SNOMED, and RxNorm.
Include descendant concepts when building concept sets to capture all specificity levels of a clinical entity.
Periodically review and update concept sets after vocabulary version upgrades to ensure continued accuracy.
Document the clinical rationale for each included or excluded concept to support peer review and replication.
Share finalized concept sets via Commons to enable consistent phenotype definitions across your research network.
